elements.text:
You are presenting your progress on a project to your boss next week. Your personal life has been hectic recently, and you haven't had much time to devote to the project, leaving you with fewer updates to report than usual.

Here are some feelings that might happen in the moment:

texts: I'm confident that I can tell my boss about what's been going on.
I'm scared that my boss will be disappointed in me.
I'm nervous for the presentation, but I'll be able to handle it.
I feel good about how I've done at this job so far.
I'm embarrassed to present my work to my boss, but that feeling will pass.
